name: Assault Armored Girls War Vasileia
short_description: This is a 3D action game in which you take weapons from your enemies to strengthen yourself. The game offers a variety of combat styles, including shooting, fighting, guarding, and invincibility, depending on the situation. In addition, the use of aerial dash enables three-dimensional combat.
detailed_description:
◆Story

The player wakes up in a mysterious dungeon. An unknown dungeon spreads out before you. Suddenly, a voice is heard. The voice announces itself as “The Administrator” and declares to the player, "Vasileia exists to advance to the next world.

Vasileia" exists in order to advance to the next world. There are four ‘Sisters’ who rule this realm." If you can defeat the “Sisters,” you will know the truth about this world."

The player was puzzled by this sudden turn of events, but the voice of his soul whispered to him." The player is confused by the sudden event, but the voice of his soul whispers to him: “I know it sounds crazy, but my soul wants to fight. 、、、、”

The player believes the voice of his soul and throws himself into the battle.

◆ Experience

- Each enemy in the dungeon is armed with a different weapon. When you defeat an enemy, they drop a screwdriver that unlocks a weapon. Players will be able to use the weapons they have unlocked.

　There are many weapons in the game, so please look for your favorite weapon.

When you defeat an enemy, you will drop a currency called packets. You can use it to enhance your weapons and yourself. Find your favorite fighting style and strengthen your weapon!

You can enjoy a variety of combat styles by using different weapons depending on the situation. In addition, you can use the aerial dash for three-dimensional combat.

The dungeon has many strong enemies, but by placing marks, you can retry to defeat them as many times as you like without any stress. You can also return to the base at any time to stop the game.

◆Local battle

You can play local battle separately from the main game.

After the tutorial is finished, VS mode will be released.

*Two controllers are required.

Translated with (free version)
